hotel_name: Crowne Plaza Al Khobar by IHG
raw_description:
Located just 500 metres from Al Rashed Shopping Mall, this 5-star hotel offers spacious rooms with satellite TV. It has 3 in-house restaurants and a full-service spa with a pool on site.

A minibar and a tea/coffee maker are in Crown Plaza Al Khobar’s air-conditioned rooms. Toiletries and a bathrobe are in the en suite bathrooms. Some offer access to the executive lounge.

Panoramic views of Al Khobar can be admired from the Oasis Café. Crowne Plaza Al Khobar has a Moroccan restaurant, and a restaurant with live cooking stations.

Various massage treatments can be scheduled at Plaza Al Khobar’s spa. It features 2 separate well-equipped gyms one for ladies and one for men and a sauna.

The Al Khobar Corniche is 3 km from Crown Plaza Al Khobar. King Fahd International Airport is 40 minutes’ drive away.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it8.4for a two-person trip.

description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at Crowne Plaza Al Khobar by IHG. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 11 key amenities including 2 swimming pools, Free WiFi, Free parking.
